title: hieracium caesitium
intro: Hieracium caesitium, also known as rough hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium caesitium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in various forms of medicine.
